task_completion.description: The order_lines.csv dataset is loaded into the Oracle Analytics workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'order_lines' listed in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics interface.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Segment Profitability' is created analyzing Sales and Profit by Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab at the bottom named 'Segment Profitability'. The active canvas should display a visualization containing 'Sales', 'Profit', and 'Customer Segment' data elements.

task_completion.description: A calculated column named 'Profit_Margin_Pct' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a custom calculation named 'Profit_Margin_Pct' in the Data Elements pane (often under a 'My Calculations' folder) or an open calculation editor showing 'Profit / Sales * 100'.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Category Margin Analysis' is created analyzing Sales and Profit_Margin_Pct by Product Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab named 'Category Margin Analysis'. The active canvas should display a visualization containing 'Sales', 'Profit_Margin_Pct', and 'Product Category'.

task_completion.description: A calculated column named 'Net_Profit_Per_Unit' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a custom calculation named 'Net_Profit_Per_Unit' in the Data Elements pane or an open calculation editor showing 'Profit / Quantity Ordered'.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Unit Economics' is created analyzing Product Category and Customer Segment economics using Net_Profit_Per_Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas tab named 'Unit Economics'. The active canvas should display a visualization containing 'Product Category', 'Customer Segment', and 'Net_Profit_Per_Unit'.

task_completion.description: The workbook is saved as 'pl_attribution.dva' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box showing the file name 'pl_attribution' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a File Explorer window showing 'pl_attribution.dva' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being actively used, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in calculation editor to create the required metrics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Oracle Analytics 'Add Calculation' dialog or 'My Calculations' folder, ensuring the agent didn't just add static text boxes to fake the visualizations.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI creation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open where the agent is running scripts to generate the .dva file directly.
